description: Drive the GDS/BMGD workflow for one story end-to-end: branch, create-story, dev-story, code-review loop, project-context/retrospective work when applicable, a commit per step, PR, and report. Delegates every production step to a model/effort-tuned subagent. `status` and `dry run` only report/plan — no branches, commits, PRs, or delegate runs.
outputs: Story branch + per-step commits; optional PR; appended run report under {output_folder}/auto-gds/reports/; status/dry run print a report only

description: Verify BMad installer registration ([modules.agds] in _bmad/config.toml / _bmad/config.user.toml) and (re)render the tool-native delegate agents from the configurable model/effort profiles; run after editing profiles or to add a tool. reset-defaults discards profile retunes in the runtime config.yaml and re-seeds the shipped defaults (re-renders if needed).
outputs: Verified [modules.agds] registration (installer-owned _bmad/config.toml / _bmad/config.user.toml) plus rendered .claude/agents and/or .codex/agents; reset-defaults re-seeds runtime config.yaml profiles (prior copy saved to config.yaml.bak)
